format: Doubles bracket, games to 21 (win by 2). Bring your own bags if you're superstitious.
rsvpNote: Text the group chat to claim your spot and your partner. Latecomers get last pick of the boards.
rules: Doubles. Pick your partner before the bracket is drawn.
Games to 21, win by 2. Cancellation scoring: 3 for a bag in the hole, 1 for a bag on the board.
Foot faults from behind the board. We will call it, and we will laugh.
The defending champions are seeded #1 and must accept all trash talk with grace.
Belly bumps encouraged. Bags in the lake are retrieved by the thrower.
